name: Floor Lamp Black - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Transform your lighting with this Floor Lamp from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Standing 57.75 inches high, this sleek floor lamp features a white cotton fabric shade in an empire shape atop a black metal pole body with a flat disc base for a contemporary look. The convenient dual pull-chain switches offer one-way on/off control for easy operation, and the six-foot cord offers flexible placement.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
